---
title: Multi-Source Cross-Detector Schema Notes
description: Pending schema notes for cross-detector transfer benchmark records.
---

Schema details are pending.

This page should eventually define source experiment records, coordinate conventions, held-out target tasks, metadata fields, splits, and example loading code.

## Expected coverage

| Area | Notes |
| --- | --- |
| Sources | Experiment, detector, simulation, and selection provenance |
| Coordinates | Per-detector geometry and coordinate normalization conventions |
| Tasks | Held-out target tasks and probe labels |
| Splits | Source, target, validation, and hidden evaluation policies |
| Examples | Minimal loading code for cross-detector batches |
